visual_observations.composition_style: promotional graphic — arched frame housing large discount text and branded product cups
props_visible: Barns branded hot matcha latte cup

text_overlays.content_summary: 25% على كل المشروبات الحارة و الباردة — 25% off all hot and cold drinks
Riyadh Kingdom of Saudi Arabia EXPO 2030 — World Expo 2030 Candidate logo

notable_visual_elements: Arched framing device — signature Barns brand shape
Official Expo 2030 candidate logo integrated as partner mark
Abstract geometric motifs echoing Vision 2030 national design language

notable_phrases: على كل المشروبات الحارة و الباردة

cultural_notes.free_notes: Barns positions itself as a Saudi national brand aligned with Vision 2030. The Expo 2030 candidate logo used as a cultural pride marker, not mere sponsorship. The discount is the transactional hook but national pride is the emotional frame.

pattern_matches.notes: Official Expo 2030 candidate logo as the hero element in the graphic
Full-frame digital graphic with discount offer tied to national occasion
Barns leverages Saudi national pride moment to drive promotional CTA
